title: Byrt
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Byrt''''' was a 200-meter public [[Transport/Legends|starferry]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was used to evacuate people from [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. It was built to handle 5,000 passengers but took on 12,000. During the evacuation it was invaded by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] looking for [[Ben Skywalker]], but were driven off by [[YVH 1]] droids under [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Ba'tra]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
